title: Older Man, Younger Woman
overview: Donavan Jackson, a founding partner at his law firm and legal professor at an esteemed college. Kiara Crockett, a beautiful, young lady with a tremendous future ahead of her. Without looking they find each other. She sees him as the strong, protective, kind man she has always desired and wished she had. In her, he sees and is reminded of the purity of love that he had at one time with his wife.
